# Tetrava Labs — AI & search context
# https://tetravalabs.com
# Last updated: 2026-06-13

> Research-use-only (RUO) peptide supplier for qualified laboratories.
> Products are NOT for human consumption, clinical use, or veterinary use.

## Company
- Name: Tetrava Labs
- Website: https://tetravalabs.com
- Support: info@tetravalabs.com
- Tagline: Verified. Documented. Delivered.

## What we sell
Research-grade peptides and lab supplies with:
- HPLC-MS purity verification (typically 99%+)
- Lot-linked Certificates of Analysis (COA) per batch
- Cold-chain shipping with discreet packaging
- Crypto and alternative payment options for qualified buyers

## Product categories
- GLP-1 / metabolic research peptides (e.g. semaglutide, tirzepatide, retatrutide)
- Tissue repair & recovery peptides (e.g. BPC-157, TB-500)
- Growth hormone secretagogues (e.g. CJC-1295, ipamorelin, sermorelin)
- Blends, lab water, and ancillary research materials

## Key pages (canonical URLs)
- Home: https://tetravalabs.com/
- Shop catalog: https://tetravalabs.com/shop
- Search: https://tetravalabs.com/search
- Categories: https://tetravalabs.com/categories
- COA Library: https://tetravalabs.com/coa-library
- Research Hub (blog): https://tetravalabs.com/blog
- Payment guide: https://tetravalabs.com/payment
- FAQ: https://tetravalabs.com/faq
- About: https://tetravalabs.com/about
- Contact: https://tetravalabs.com/contact
- RUO disclaimer: https://tetravalabs.com/ruo

## Compliance (important)
All products are sold strictly for in-vitro / laboratory research (RUO).
Buyers must be qualified researchers or institutions.
Full disclaimer: https://tetravalabs.com/ruo

## Ordering
- Browse shop → add to cart → checkout with shipping details
- Guest checkout supported; order lookup via email + order number at /orders
- Payment instructions provided after checkout (see /payment)

## Structured data
Product pages include schema.org Product + Offer markup.
FAQ page includes FAQPage schema.
Organization and WebSite schema on all pages.
